title: New blog essay — Data Should Work Like Soil
summary: The second post on the xNet blog is live: an essay on mycelial networks, the nervous systems of bodies, companies, and forests, and how an internet — like a damaged forest — is healed by biodiversity, reciprocity, and care. Read it at /blog/data-should-work-like-soil, or subscribe via RSS at /blog/rss.xml.
